content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.42%, Bank Nifty -1.26%, PSU Banks -2.02% — broad weakness with energy/metals selectively bid on crude premium. India VIX at 18 elevated. Book is 45% deployed across 7 names with a slight net positive unrealized. Priority is locking in gains via SL trails on winners (PNBHOUSING, NESTLEIND, NTPC) rather than chasing fresh breakouts in extended names.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +5.8%; trailing SL up from 1025 to 1030 (just below today's intraday low of 1036 zone and pivot S1 at 978 is too loose). Locks in ~4.7% gain. Price consolidating after huge run from 780 to 1050 in 4 weeks — protect gains; thesis (Q4 beat, sub-1% NPA) intact, target 1095 retained."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1.7%, well above SL 119. Gold thesis (geopolitical tension, central bank buying) intact. SMA20 at 122 acting as support. Hold; no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op check: current SL is already 1425. Skipping — emitting HOLD instead via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5%, faded from 414 high to 407. SL at 402 is just below entry; keep room until Q4 results May 15 catalyst. Power-cluster exposure already concentrated (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA + GOLDBEES proxy = ~25% capital), do NOT add."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op: current SL already 1735. Will use HOLD in position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4%, near 52w high. SL at 315 (~1.7% below entry) appropriate. Q4 results May 19 catalyst pending. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, faded from 473 high to 466 after Q4 print. SL 463 tight (~1.3% below entry). Wait for follow-through; do not panic exit a fresh entry on day-one fade."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in +4.7% on a 5.8% winner; consolidation pattern."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 119 appropriate; structural macro thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1425 already at near-breakeven; near 52w high, let it run toward 1465."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Faded near 52w high; awaiting May 15 Q4 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1735 already at breakeven; Organon deal digestion ongoing."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 315 fine; Q4 May 19."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Day-one fade post Q4 print; SL 463 will discipline if thesis fails."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GLENMARK, ONGC, NLCINDIA, COALINDIA all extended at/near 52w highs — no chase. NAM-INDIA strong AMC story but +37% MoM rally too extended for fresh entry. TATACHEM +12% on low 0.4x volume with weak Q3 (-75%) and bearish research consensus — AVOID, looks like a squeeze. RKFORGE has unresolved accounting scandal — HARD AVOID. CESC interesting power utility with Q4 May 11 catalyst, but power-cluster already at 25% of capital. Monitor pending orders: TATAPOWER LIMIT 443 should be CANCELLED to avoid adding to power cluster; HINDZINC LIMIT 612 OK; PHARMABEES 23.65 OK as defensive.",
  "portfolio_notes": "5-day track record is poor (14% win rate, 0.4x profit factor) — must tighten discipline. Power/energy cluster (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA) is already ~25% of capital; adding TATAPOWER would breach cluster discipline. The TATAPOWER pending order at 443 should be cancelled in next cycle if market doesn't reverse. Cash buffer at 55% is healthy and intentional given VIX 18 + Bank Nifty -1.3%. No new entries today — the only edge is managing what's already on the book. PNBHOUSING SL trail is the single highest-value action this tick."
}
